name: XML Tools
description: 10 powerful XML utilities in one place — format, beautify, minify, validate, view, escape, unescape, convert XML to CSV, CSV to XML, and diff two XML documents. All processing is 100% client-side; no data is ever sent to a server.
author: Shamrouz Awan
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polyline points='16 18 22 12 16 6'/><polyline points='8 6 2 12 8 18'/></svg>

meta.title: XML Tools — 10 Free Online XML Utilities
meta.description: Format, validate, minify, beautify, view, escape, convert and diff XML data with 10 free browser-based tools. No sign-up required. XML to CSV, CSV to XML, and more.
